uplink.description: 0x11 sensor-state report: PIR detected, button and dry-input clear
uplink._note: PIRSensorState = BinarySensorReport bit0; bytes[8]=1. battery byte 28=0x1C -> 2.8V. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 2.8, PIRSensorState 1, all others 0) and renormalizing.
ExternalShockSensorState = BinarySensorReport bit7; bytes[8]=128. Vibration counts as motion. Verified against reference (ExternalShockSensorState 1).

uplink.description: 0x11 sensor-state report: all motion clear, button pressed and dry input active
uplink._note: BinarySensorReport=(bytes[7]<<8|bytes[8])=0x0102. bit1 (button)=1, bit8 (dry contact in)=1, all motion bits (0,6,7)=0. Verified against reference (EmergenceButtonaLAlarmState 1, ExternalDryContactPointINState 1, PIR/shock states 0).

uplink.description: 0x11 sensor-state report: low battery, internal shock detected
uplink._note: battery byte 156=0x9C: high bit set (low battery), low 7 bits 0x1C -> 2.8V. InternalShockSensorState = bit6; bytes[8]=64. Verified against reference (Volt '2.8(low battery)', InternalShockSensorState 1).

uplink.description: Startup version report (0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: reportType 0x00 device-info frame (upstream emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode); no motion -> error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is not a data report
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries config responses (upstream ConfigReportRsp), not measurements.
